name: DevCheap
description: Curated developer deals and discounts. Search, browse, and discover free credits, lifetime licenses, and limited offers.

skills.name: browse-deals
skills.description: Browse all active developer deals with filtering by category and pricing

skills.name: view-deal
skills.description: View detailed information about a specific developer deal

skills.name: search-deals
skills.description: Search developer deals by keyword, category, or pricing type

skills.name: archive
skills.description: View archived deals with ratings below 8.0

skills.name: deals-data
skills.description: Access raw deal data in JSONL format for programmatic consumption
